description:
A letter of a man identified by Bareket as Sahlān b. Abraham to Segan ha-Yeshiva (Aaron the cantor), we read that “when the complaining of the wife of ʿAlī b. Bishr ben Dardān/Durdān continued, the matter required the appointment of a representative to go to her to investigate her matter since she is veiled. (Info from Oded Zinger PhD, p. 44n86). 
On the same page and on verso an Arabic letter - needs examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
